top_signals.title: FedEx slowly recovers from operational meltdown in Vietnam
top_signals.summary:
FedEx says it has significantly reduced cargo backlogs at its warehouses in Vietnam after a messy switch to a new ground delivery partner and new technology system.

The post FedEx slowly recovers from operational meltdown in Vietnam appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trucking group asks federal court to strip New York, California of CDL authority
top_signals.summary:
The Small Business in Transportation Coalition has asked a federal court to push for decertification of CDL programs in New York and California.

The post Trucking group asks federal court to strip New York, California of CDL authority appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance raises $32 million Series A, says valuation grew 10x from seed
top_signals.summary: CoinFund led the round, with Coinbase Ventures, Haun Ventures, Jump Capital, Paxos, Chainlink Labs and others participating.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
